title: Merchant Directory
noStoresFound: No store records found in system
brandAestheticsDesc: Define how your store looks to customers. High-quality visuals increase customer trust and conversion.
selectCitiesFirst: Select cities first to see available towns
manageDeliveryPricing: Manage your delivery zones and pricing
addAreaNote: Note: Adding a city will automatically include all its towns/neighborhoods with the default price you set. You can then customize individual prices below.
noAreasFoundForTown: No delivery areas found for this town.
resetDeliveryAreasMessage: Are you sure you want to remove all delivery areas? This action cannot be undone.
noSocialMedia: No social media links added. Select a platform to add one.
acceptOffDay: Accept orders even on off days
acceptClosedHours: Accept orders even during closed hours
notAcceptingOrdersMsg: Your store is currently set to not accept any orders. Customers will successfully browse your menu but cannot add items to cart or place orders.
selectTypeFirst: Please select a business type first to see categories
enableStoreReviewsDesc: Allow customers to leave overall reviews and ratings for your store.
enableProductReviewsDesc: Allow customers to leave specific reviews and ratings for individual products.
maxOrdersPerDriverDesc: Automatically mark drivers as "Busy" when they reach this limit.
selectCategoriesDesc: Specific categories that best describe your offerings
isHiringDriversDesc: Enable this to allow freelance drivers to find and apply to work with your store.
verificationApprovedMessage: Your store is now verified and has been granted the verified badge.
verificationPendingMessage: Our team is currently reviewing your verification documents. We will notify you once the process is complete.
rejectionNoReason: Your verification request was rejected. Please review your documents and try again.
verificationSubmissionDesc: Please provide your official Commercial Register details to verify your store and build trust with customers.
verificationAcknowledge: By submitting, you certify that all information provided is accurate and legitimate.
verificationSubmittedDesc: Your identity documents have been received and are now in the queue for review.
rejectionReasonNote: Note: This message will be sent to the store owner and should be helpful for them to correct their application.
